summary: The diff implements both REQ-7 and REQ-8 comprehensively. RegistrationModal collects the three required fields with inline validation, PaymentModal shows the exact UPI ID placeholder 'Apna UPI ID eithe likho', displays entry fee, provides file upload with preview, and a confirmation button. MatchCard is wired to open the flow on 'Join Now'. All components follow the dark neon-red theme. A ConfirmationModal is also added as a bonus post-payment step. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.

hallucinated_features.description: A ConfirmationModal (success screen) is added as a third step after payment submission, showing a success icon, match details, and registration info summary.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request and requirements (REQ-7, REQ-8) only specify a registration form step and a UPI payment step. A post-payment confirmation screen/modal was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Copy UPI ID' button is included in the PaymentModal, allowing users to copy the UPI ID to clipboard.
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirements do not mention a copy-to-clipboard feature for the UPI ID.
